$comment: Shared, tracked project settings for schnapp-os. Local-only overrides go in settings.local.json. autoMemoryDirectory points the harness auto-memory at the git-tracked VAULT global memory lane (~/code/schnapp-vault/memory, repo SchnappAPI/schnapp-vault) so memory commits and syncs across machines/surfaces (procedures in docs/memory-lane.md, schema in the vault agents.md); the same value is set at USER scope in ~/.claude/settings.json so the lane is active everywhere - plugins can't set this key (handoff 023). HOOKS (scripts in hooks/, canonical procedures in docs/memory-lane.md): all wired HERE against live ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} paths - PreToolUse force-push guard (no-force-push-guard.sh, decisions/0011 #9, blocks force-push to protected history), PostToolUse secret-scan (secret-scan-on-write.sh - shift-left leak guard: runs scan-secrets.sh on each Write/Edit'd file, exit 2 on a literal secret VALUE; the edit-time complement to the freshness.yml CI secret gate) + PostToolUse shellcheck (shellcheck-on-write.sh - lints each Write/Edit'd *.sh at info-and-above, catches the unquoted-var/word-split class incl. SC2086, exit 2 on a finding; no-ops if shellcheck absent) + PostToolUse em-dash guard (em-dash-on-write.sh - writing-style gate: runs check-writing-style.sh on each Write/Edit'd file, exit 2 on an em dash in a live file, frozen history exempt; the edit-time complement to the ci-lint.yml writing-style gate, per the decisions/0026 enforcement ladder) + PostToolUse length-advisory (length-advisory.sh: soft WARN, never blocks, always exit 0, when a Write/Edit'd rules/global/*.md, other rules/**/*.md, or top-level CLAUDE.md exceeds a heuristic line limit; protects the lean always-load layer), UserPromptSubmit capture-nudge (learning-loop correction trigger), SessionStart freshness gate (session-start-gate.sh), Stop push-gate (session-stop-push-gate.sh), SessionEnd backup (session-end-backup.sh). This replaces the prior split where SessionStart+Stop were delivered globally by the schnapp-os-core plugin: per decision 0011 #2 (plainer repo, drop plugin-packaging reliance) and because plugin snapshot delivery was unreliable (installed_plugins.json pinned old commits / referenced cleaned cache paths, so a stale claude-kit-era gate fired), hooks read the live repo file every session - no snapshot drift. The plugin hooks.json now declares no hooks. These hooks are scoped to schnapp-os (the OS repo); cross-surface freshness for hookless surfaces is the remote-MCP layer's job. Project hooks honored after the per-machine workspace-trust dialog; hooks load at session start (restart to pick up changes).
